languages.text: {n}Пациент, спасенный вами еще при первом посещении Заркова, хотя и выглядит неважно, но крепко сжимает лазружье.{/n} "Кажется, вы спасли меня уже дважды, Лорд-капитан".
{n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Пациент, спасенный вами еще при первом посещении Заркова, хотя и выглядит неважно, но крепко сжимает лазружье.{/n} "Кажется, вы спасли меня уже дважды, Лорд-капитан".

{n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}你第一次来扎尔科夫时救下的那个伤员如今伤势严重，但依然牢牢握着他的激光枪。{/n}“您已经救了我两次了，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}你第一次来扎尔科夫时救下的那个伤员如今伤势严重，但依然牢牢握着他的激光枪。{/n}“您已经救了我两次了，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}Zarkov'a ilk gelişinde kurtardığın hastanın durumu kötü ama yine de silazerini sıkıca tutmaya devam ediyor.{/n} "Görünüşe göre beni iki kez kurtarmış oldunuz Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zarkov'a ilk gelişinde kurtardığın hastanın durumu kötü ama yine de silazerini sıkıca tutmaya devam ediyor.{/n} "Görünüşe göre beni iki kez kurtarmış oldunuz Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: {n}Le patient que vous avez sauvé lors de votre première visite sur Zarkov est en piteux état, mais il tient toujours fermement son fusil laser.{/n} « C'est la deuxième fois que vous venez à mon secours, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le patient que vous avez sauvé lors de votre première visite sur Zarkov est en piteux état, mais il tient toujours fermement son fusil laser.{/n} « C'est la deuxième fois que vous venez à mon secours, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}El paciente al que rescataste en tu primer viaje a Zarkov está en mal estado, pero mantiene su rifle láser firme.{/n} «Esta es la segunda vez que me salva, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}El paciente al que rescataste en tu primer viaje a Zarkov está en mal estado, pero mantiene su rifle láser firme.{/n} «Esta es la segunda vez que me salva, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: {n}Der Patient, den du auf deiner ersten Reise nach Zarkov gerettet hast, ist in schlechtem Zustand, hält sein Lasergewehr aber fest in der Hand.{/n} "Wie's aussieht, habt Ihr mich jetzt zum zweiten Mal gerettet, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Patient, den du auf deiner ersten Reise nach Zarkov gerettet hast, ist in schlechtem Zustand, hält sein Lasergewehr aber fest in der Hand.{/n} "Wie's aussieht, habt Ihr mich jetzt zum zweiten Mal gerettet, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}ザルコフへの最初の遠征で君が救い出した患者は、ひどい有様だが、それでもレーザーガンをしっかりと握りしめている。{/n}「どうやら、あなたには二度も命を救われたようですね、ロード・キャプテン。」
languages.original_text: {n}The patient you rescued back on your first trip to Zarkov is in poor shape, yet he maintains a firm grip on his lasgun.{/n} "It seems you have saved me twice now, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}ザルコフへの最初の遠征で君が救い出した患者は、ひどい有様だが、それでもレーザーガンをしっかりと握りしめている。{/n}「どうやら、あなたには二度も命を救われたようですね、ロード・キャプテン。」
